content.problemStatement:
In this task, you are required to write a program that displays your daily routine, divided into morning, afternoon, and evening parts. Each task should appear on a new line, and you will use an empty line to separate different parts of the day. Additionally, utilize the `end` parameter to print items on new lines.

You should format your output as follows:
constraints: The program must produce exactly the specified output.
content.outputFormat:
Print the daily routine exactly as shown, with blank lines separating the three parts:
Morning Routine:
Wake up
Brush teeth
Have breakfast

Afternoon Routine:
Work/Study
Lunch
Nap

Evening Routine:
Exercise
Dinner
Relax/Leisure time

sampleTestCases.output:
Morning Routine:
Wake up
Brush teeth
Have breakfast

Afternoon Routine:
Work/Study
Lunch
Nap

Evening Routine:
Exercise
Dinner
Relax/Leisure time
sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the fixed routine exactly as required.

solution.approach: The task does not require any computation. The program simply prints a fixed multi-line string. Use the language's standard output functions, ensuring that line breaks match the specification. No input is read.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – constant time to output a fixed number of characters.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few constant‑size variables are used.

code.Python3:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
print("Morning Routine:")
print("Wake up")
print("Brush teeth")
print("Have breakfast")
print()
print("Afternoon Routine:")
print("Work/Study")
print("Lunch")
print("Nap")
print()
print("Evening Routine:")
print("Exercise")
print("Dinner")
print("Relax/Leisure time")
